goal: Slice A: Audit issues/done/*.md whose body or frontmatter records a historical move to issues/open/ (FD-01). Verify re-close evidence; must-reopen only with proof. Append to docs/process/false-done-audit-2026-06-12.md.
summary: FD-01 false-done audit — 156 candidates, 7 reopen with proof
acceptanceCriteria: must-reopen issues git mv'd to issues/open/
verify quick passes after wave commit
